name: Set of 3 Recycled Glass Spice Containers - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Add elegant organization to your kitchen shelves with this Set of 3 Recycled Glass Spice Containers from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnoli. Each container is crafted from 100% recycled glass in a cylindrical shape, and they have wood lids that fit securely to help seal in freshness. These spice jars are perfectly sized for a variety of seasonings and tuck neatly into drawers, countertop racks or open shelving.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy
